abnormal brainstem and cerebellar structure, ataxia, eye movement disorders, respiratory disturbances during sleep, developmental delays, dysmorphism, liver malformation, kidney function issues, sensorineural hearing loss
pain, acroparasthesias, corneal verticillata, angiokeratomas, proteinuria, left ventricular hypertrophy, decreased sweating ability, gastrointestinal involvement, stroke, myocardial infarction

developmental regression after normal initial growth, stereotyped hand movements, breathing irregularities, severe mental and physical disability, seizures, microcephaly, tongue thrusting, tooth grinding, poor coordination, autistic features
skeletal dysplasia characterized by short stature, kyphoscoliosis, odontoid hypoplasia, thickened cornea, dental crowding, hernia, heart defects, respiratory insufficiency, coarse facies, hoarseness

progressive neurological deterioration, macroglossia, coarse facial features, speech difficulty, aggressive behavior, seizures, stiffness, walking instability, painful swelling around large joints, frequent infections
